Heading: The Oldest Right
Quote: A child's right to peace is older than any border.
Caption: On this day we remember: every treaty signed in a capital means nothing if a child in a village still sleeps afraid.

Heading: Presence of Understanding
Quote: Peace is not the absence of conflict but the presence of understanding.
Caption: Two enemies who sit and truly listen have already won half the war.

Heading: Completing Each Other
Quote: Harmony begins when we stop competing and start completing each other.
Caption: Your weakness is my strength and together we are not balanced we are unstoppable.

Heading: No Human Is Illegal
Quote: No human is illegal only borders are invented; humanity is real.
Caption: Refugees do not leave their dignity at the shoreline they carry it soaked but unbroken into every new land.

Heading: The First Seed
Quote: Inner stillness is the first seed of outer peace.
Caption: Yoga reminds us: a world at war begins with a heart at war with itself.

Heading: One Conversation at a Time
Quote: A peaceful world is built one conversation at a time.
Caption: No peace treaty was ever signed without a first awkward barely audible sentence of goodwill.

Heading: Sow Seeds of Peace
Quote: Sow seeds of peace; harvest a better tomorrow.
Caption: The apple tree you plant today will shade a child who has never known your bitterness.

Heading: Wings of Education
Quote: Peace travels fastest on the wings of education.
Caption: An ignorant man picks up a stone; an educated man picks up a phone to call for dialogue.

Heading: Spoken by All Who Listen
Quote: The language of peace is spoken by all who listen.
Caption: Silence is not empty it is the most crowded space filled with things we are too afraid to say.

Heading: A Vote for Peace
Quote: Every act of kindness is a vote for peace.
Caption: In a world that often rewards cruelty a gentle word is a revolutionary ballot.

Heading: The Bravest Sound
Quote: A calm voice in a storm is the bravest sound.
Caption: Anyone can shout it takes a warrior to whisper reason into chaos.

Heading: No Soil for War
Quote: Where understanding grows war finds no soil.
Caption: Hatred is a weed it cannot survive where empathy has already taken root.

Heading: Shared Achievement
Quote: Peace is humanity's greatest shared achievement.
Caption: We remember the wars we lost but we forget the peace we built today we remember that too.

Heading: Seeing the Human
Quote: Justice is the art of seeing the human in every accusation.
Caption: A fair trial is not a gift it is the proof that a society has not yet abandoned its own soul.

Heading: Before Anything Else
Quote: We are all human before we are anything else.
Caption: Your passport your god your flag these are costumes. Underneath the same fragile heart beats.

Heading: The Bridge
Quote: Empathy is the bridge between me and you.
Caption: Cross it often and the gap you feared becomes the path you walk together every day.

Heading: Highest Self
Quote: To serve others is to find your highest self.
Caption: Ego asks 'what do I get?' service answers 'I have already received the chance to help.'

Heading: A Peace Treaty Signed with Laughter
Quote: Friendship across a divide is a peace treaty signed with laughter.
Caption: Today we celebrate the friends who should have been enemies and chose not to be.

Heading: A Story Worth Hearing
Quote: Every life carries a story worth hearing.
Caption: The person you ignored today has survived storms you cannot imagine and their silence is not emptiness.

Heading: Find a Friend
Quote: In the eyes of a stranger find a friend.
Caption: The unfamiliar is just a memory you haven't made yet reach out and begin.

Heading: A Worldview That Survives
Quote: An indigenous language saved is a worldview that survives.
Caption: When a language dies we do not just lose words we lose entire ways of dreaming.

Heading: Changes Everything
Quote: Compassion costs nothing and changes everything.
Caption: The smallest kindness a held door a patient ear can reroute a life that was veering toward despair.

Heading: A Calling
Quote: Humanity is not a passport it is a calling.
Caption: Aid workers do not cross borders to save 'others' they cross because the word 'other' has no meaning in their hearts.

Heading: Heal the World
Quote: Feel the pain of others and you will heal the world.
Caption: Pity watches from the shore; empathy jumps in and learns to swim.

Heading: Not a Nationality
Quote: Humanity is not a nationality; it is a calling.
Caption: The only flag that should never be lowered is the one that reads 'we belong to each other'.

Heading: Infinite Stories
Quote: One human family infinite stories.
Caption: Your neighbour's grandmother might have sung a lullaby in a language you have never heard and it was beautiful.

Heading: Measure of a Society
Quote: The measure of a society is how it treats its most vulnerable.
Caption: Economic growth without care for the elderly the sick the poor is not progress it is polished indifference.

Heading: Bandage or Cure
Quote: Charity without justice is a bandage; justice without charity is cold.
Caption: Give today but also demand a world where giving is less necessary that is true charity.

Heading: Empower a Generation
Quote: Empower a woman; empower a generation.
Caption: When she rises she does not rise alone she pulls her children her neighbours and her future under her arm.

Heading: No Boundary
Quote: A woman's potential knows no boundary.
Caption: The only ceiling that exists is the one we keep rebuilding take down a brick today.

Heading: When Listening Stops
Quote: Democracy dies when the first citizen stops listening.
Caption: Elections are not enough a living democracy needs neighbours who argue with love and vote with courage.

Heading: A Right Not a Privilege
Quote: Equal opportunity is not a privilege; it is a right.
Caption: Fairness does not mean giving everyone the same thing it means giving each what they truly need to stand.

Heading: The Permanent Refusal
Quote: Peace is not a pause in fighting it is the permanent refusal to start.
Caption: On this day let us not simply stop let us choose to never begin the next war.

Heading: Light the Way
Quote: Women in STEM light the way for all of us.
Caption: A girl who solves a math problem today may solve world hunger tomorrow if we let her stay in the room.

Heading: All Voices Lead
Quote: The world gets better when all voices lead.
Caption: A table missing half its chairs cannot produce a full decision invite everyone.

Heading: The Courage to Absorb
Quote: Non-violence is not passivity it is the courage to absorb hatred and return love.
Caption: Gandhi taught us: you can break a stone with a stone or you can melt it with patience one builds graves the other builds gardens.

Heading: A Braver World
Quote: Behind every barrier broken is a braver world.
Caption: Every time a woman walks through a door that was once locked she holds it open for the next ten.

Heading: Changing the Grammar
Quote: A girl who learns to say 'no' changes the grammar of the world.
Caption: Today we protect girls not because they are vulnerable but because they are powerful and power must be nurtured.

Heading: Silence Half the World
Quote: Silence a woman; silence half the world.
Caption: When you ignore her voice you do not keep the peace you bury the wisdom that could have prevented the next war.

Heading: She Who Learns
Quote: She who learns leads.
Caption: Education is not a ladder for her alone it is a bridge that carries everyone behind her.

Heading: One Charter
Quote: One flag cannot hold humanity but one charter can.
Caption: The United Nations is not perfect but it is the imperfect table where we all agreed to sit.

Heading: Courage Has No Gender
Quote: Courage has no gender.
Caption: Bravery does not check your ID it only asks if you are willing to stand up for someone smaller than you.

Heading: The First Step
Quote: Peace is not a destination it is the way you walk.
Caption: Walk gently and you will arrive already at peace.

Heading: The Shared Burden
Quote: Justice is not a gift you give to the weak it is a debt you owe to the strong.
Caption: Pay your debts.

Heading: The Quiet Word
Quote: A single honest word can break a wall of lies.
Caption: Speak it even if your voice trembles.

Heading: The Long Table
Quote: At the table of humanity there are no head seats only side by side.
Caption: Pull up a chair for everyone.

Heading: The Open Hand
Quote: An open hand is harder to strike than a closed fist.
Caption: Keep your palms up.

Heading: The Silent Witness
Quote: To witness injustice and say nothing is to become its accomplice.
Caption: Your voice is the only weapon you need.

Heading: The Shared Story
Quote: Every conflict is a story of hurt and every peace is a story of listening.
Caption: Tell the second story.

Heading: The Broken Circle
Quote: A circle that excludes one is a broken chain.
Caption: Link every link no one left out.

Heading: The Small Kindness
Quote: A single act of kindness is a stone dropped in still water the ripples go on forever.
Caption: Drop your stone today.

Heading: The Unfinished Sentence
Quote: Peace is not a period it is a comma a pause before the next difficult conversation.
Caption: Keep talking.

Event: International Day of Women and Girls in Science
Heading: The Unseen Equation
Quote: A girl in a lab coat is a formula for a more peaceful world.
Caption: When women solve problems they solve for everyone not just for themselves.

Heading: The Quiet Courage
Quote: Courage is not the absence of fear it is fear that has said its prayers.
Caption: Say your prayers then act.

Heading: The Shared Mirror
Quote: When you look at another you see a mirror treat it kindly.
Caption: What you break in them you break in yourself.

Heading: The Open Gate
Quote: A wall keeps out enemies but also keeps in friends.
Caption: Build gates not walls.

Heading: The Silent Apology
Quote: The hardest words are 'I was wrong' but they are also the most healing.
Caption: Say them before it is too late.

Heading: The Long Walk
Quote: Peace is a long walk take it one step at a time.
Caption: Do not look for shortcuts; the walk is the point.

Heading: The Shared Table
Quote: At the table of peace everyone brings a dish even your enemy.
Caption: Taste it before you refuse it.

Heading: The Quiet Listener
Quote: The best peacemakers are the best listeners.
Caption: Turn down your voice; turn up your ears.

Heading: The Broken Sword
Quote: A sword can be beaten into a ploughshare but only if you are willing to put down the hammer.
Caption: Put it down today.

Heading: The Shared Breath
Quote: Two enemies breathing the same air that is the beginning of peace.
Caption: Notice the air you share.

Heading: The Open Window
Quote: When you open a window you let in fresh air and maybe a fresh perspective.
Caption: Open the window of your mind.

Heading: The Silent Treaty
Quote: Every handshake is a treaty honour it.
Caption: Your word is your bond.

Heading: The Shared Song
Quote: A song sung together cannot be sung in anger.
Caption: Sing with your enemy you might find harmony.

Heading: The Quiet Dawn
Quote: Every dawn is a ceasefire a promise that the night is over.
Caption: Keep that promise through the day.

Heading: The Broken Chain
Quote: Injustice anywhere is a broken link in the chain of humanity.
Caption: Fix the link do not just polish the others.

Heading: The Shared Burden
Quote: Carrying a burden alone is heavy carrying it together is light.
Caption: Offer your shoulder.

Heading: The Open Door
Quote: A door closed is a door to misunderstanding.
Caption: Open it even if you are afraid of what is on the other side.

Heading: The Silent Vow
Quote: A vow for peace is not made with words it is made with daily acts.
Caption: Act peace every day.

Heading: The Shared Light
Quote: Light is the opposite of darkness but also of ignorance.
Caption: Be a light for someone today.

Heading: The Quiet Question
Quote: The question 'what do you need?' is more powerful than 'what do you want?'.
Caption: Ask it and listen to the answer.

Heading: The Broken Promise
Quote: A promise of peace is a seed water it or it dies.
Caption: Do not let it dry.

Heading: The Shared Hope
Quote: Hope is not a feeling it is a discipline.
Caption: Practice it every morning.

Heading: The Open Heart
Quote: A heart that is closed is a prison.
Caption: Unlock it the key is empathy.

Heading: The Silent Walk
Quote: Walking beside someone in silence can be louder than a speech.
Caption: Take that walk.

Heading: The Shared Dream
Quote: A dream of peace is not enough you need a plan.
Caption: Make the plan then dream bigger.

Heading: The Peace of the Forest
Quote: Biodiversity is not just an ecology it is a peace treaty between species.
Caption: When we protect all life we protect the conditions for our own peace.

Heading: The Quiet Soldier
Quote: The bravest soldier is the one who lays down their arms.
Caption: Courage is not killing it is choosing not to.

Heading: The Shared Meal
Quote: Breaking bread with an enemy is the first step to making a friend.
Caption: Share your bread.

Heading: The Open Road
Quote: The road to peace is paved with uncomfortable conversations.
Caption: Walk it anyway the destination is worth it.

Heading: The Silent Scream
Quote: Every act of violence begins with a scream not heard.
Caption: Learn to hear the quiet screams.

Heading: The Shared Earth
Quote: We all stand on the same earth it does not choose sides.
Caption: Neither should we.

Heading: The Broken Clock
Quote: Time does not heal all wounds but truth and time together can.
Caption: Tell the truth then wait.

Heading: The Shared Sky
Quote: The sky above us is the same no borders no checkpoints.
Caption: Look up together.

Heading: The Quiet Hero
Quote: The hero is not the one who fights it is the one who stops fighting.
Caption: Be that hero.

Heading: The Shared Pain
Quote: Pain shared is pain halved and also understood.
Caption: Share your pain listen to theirs.

Heading: The Open Book
Quote: History is an open book read it honestly or repeat its mistakes.
Caption: Read carefully.

Heading: The Silent Treaty
Quote: Every ceasefire is a promise keep it even when it is hard.
Caption: Hard is not impossible.

Heading: The Shared Future
Quote: The future belongs to those who build peace today.
Caption: Lay a brick every hour.

Heading: The Quiet Rebuild
Quote: After the war the hardest work is not rebuilding walls it is rebuilding trust.
Caption: Start with a single honest sentence.

Heading: The Shared Name
Quote: We have many names but one name we all share: human.
Caption: Use that name first.

Heading: The Open Gate
Quote: A gate left open is an invitation.
Caption: Invite your enemy in they might bring tea.

Heading: The Silent Promise
Quote: A promise of peace is not a contract it is a living thing.
Caption: Feed it daily.

Heading: The Shared Breath
Quote: Breathing the same air is the first act of peace.
Caption: Notice it and be grateful.

Heading: The Quiet Dawn
Quote: Every sunrise is a chance to start again.
Caption: Start again even if you failed yesterday.

Heading: The Broken Circle
Quote: A circle that excludes is not a circle it is a line.
Caption: Close the circle include everyone.

Heading: The Shared Weight
Quote: Weight shared is weight lightened.
Caption: Carry someone else's burden for a while.

Heading: The Open Heart
Quote: A heart that forgives is a heart that is free.
Caption: Forgive not for them for you.

Heading: The Silent Song
Quote: The song of peace has no words only actions.
Caption: Sing it with your hands.

Heading: The Shared Dream
Quote: Dreaming of peace is not childish it is the only grown up thing left.
Caption: Dream big then act.

Heading: The Quiet Soldier
Quote: The soldier who plants a tree has won a greater victory.
Caption: Plant a tree today.

Heading: The Shared Meal
Quote: A shared meal is a shared truce even if only for an hour.
Caption: Extend that hour.

Heading: The Open Door
Quote: When you open your door you open your heart.
Caption: Do it the world is waiting.

Heading: The Silent Vow
Quote: A vow of non-violence is not passivity it is active courage.
Caption: Take the vow today.

Heading: The Shared Pain
Quote: Pain is the universal language learn to speak it.
Caption: Then learn to heal it.

Heading: The Smallest Vote
Quote: A vote is not just a right it is a brick in the wall against tyranny.
Caption: Today remember: democracy is not a spectator sport it is a full contact martial art of the mind.

Heading: The Quiet Listener
Quote: The best leader is the best listener.
Caption: Listen then act.

Heading: The Shared Light
Quote: Lighting a candle for peace is good but lighting a fire for justice is better.
Caption: Do both.

Heading: The Open Hand
Quote: An open hand can hold a flower or a stone choose the flower.
Caption: Choose every time.

Heading: The Elders' Peace
Quote: Every elder has a library of wars survived listen and you will learn peace.
Caption: The old do not need your pity they need your ear.

Heading: The Silent Treaty
Quote: Every kind word is a treaty signed without ink.
Caption: Sign many treaties.

Heading: The Shared Sky
Quote: The sky does not care about your passport.
Caption: Neither should you.

Heading: The Quiet Dawn
Quote: The dawn after a war is the most beautiful because it is a promise.
Caption: Keep the promise.

Event: International Day for the Eradication of Poverty
Heading: The Peace of Full Bellies
Quote: There is no peace with an empty stomach.
Caption: Eradicating poverty is not charity it is the most effective peace programme ever designed.

Heading: The Shared Breath
Quote: Breathe in you are alive. Breathe out someone else is too.
Caption: Share that breath.

Heading: The Open Road
Quote: The road to peace is paved with small steps take one now.
Caption: Do not wait for a grand plan.

Heading: The Silent Song
Quote: The song of peace is sung in silence by the mother who forgives the father who stays.
Caption: Sing it.

Heading: The Shared Hope
Quote: Hope is the anchor of peace without it we drift.
Caption: Drop your anchor.

Heading: The Quiet Soldier
Quote: The bravest soldier is the one who says 'enough'.
Caption: Say it today.

Heading: The Shared Meal
Quote: A meal shared with a stranger is a meal shared with a future friend.
Caption: Set an extra plate.

Heading: The Open Heart
Quote: A heart that holds a grudge is a prison unlock it.
Caption: The key is forgiveness.

Heading: The Silent Treaty
Quote: Every apology is a treaty accept it or war continues.
Caption: Accept it.

Heading: The Shared Dream
Quote: Dream of a world where your enemy sleeps peacefully.
Caption: Then work to make it real.

Heading: The Quiet Dawn
Quote: Every morning is a ceasefire honour it.
Caption: Do not reload.

Heading: The Shared Breath
Quote: Breathing is the first peace do not take it for granted.
Caption: Breathe with intention.

Heading: The Open Door
Quote: A door opened to a refugee is a door opened to peace.
Caption: Open it wide.

Heading: The Silent Vow
Quote: Vow to speak only words that heal.
Caption: Then speak them even when it is hard.

Heading: The Shared Light
Quote: A single act of kindness is a lighthouse in a storm.
Caption: Be that lighthouse.

Heading: The Quiet Listener
Quote: Listen to the child who is afraid they are telling you about the next war.
Caption: Prevent it by hearing them.

Heading: The Shared Meal
Quote: Bread broken together is a treaty that cannot be unmade.
Caption: Bake more bread.

Heading: The Silent Night
Quote: On the night before Christmas remember: peace began in a stable.
Caption: Humility is the mother of peace.

Heading: The Shared Hope
Quote: Hope is not a season it is a decision.
Caption: Decide today.

Heading: The Year's End
Quote: As the year ends ask: did I make peace? If not start tomorrow.
Caption: Tomorrow is the first day of the rest of your peace.
